title: An Act Clarifying Exemptions from the Law Regulating Products Containing PFAS
last_house_action: 5/6/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/7/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Reports READ On motion by Senator TEPLER of Sagadahoc The Majority Ought to Pass As Amended Report ACCEPTED READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (S-27) READ . ADOPTED Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (S-27) Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence

Reports READ . On motion of Representative DOUDERA of Camden, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-27) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-27) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
